title: daphne tenuiramis
intro: Daphne tenuiramis, also known as the lesser spurge laurel, is a plant species in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammatory conditions and skin issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving skin health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Daphne tenuiramis include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
